note: Reconciliation registry (SCALE_PLAN §4) — German. 'merge' folds duplicate unit records into a canonical id: the dupe's names become aliases and every OOB/parent reference is redirected, then the dupe is dropped. 'incarnations' documents formation ordinals (a designation reused after destruction/reformation maps to distinct ids by date range; the units already exist separately). Hand-verified — heuristic detection (number+class collisions, roster gaps) only SUGGESTS candidates and over-predicts (e.g. Guards != line number, 43% of SU divisions have a refit gap), so entries here are reviewed individually.

8. Armee.note: from Armeeabteilung Kempf (the 1939 8. Armee is not yet a separate incarnation)

16. Panzer-Division.note: re-formed in Brittany, France (2nd formation not separately modelled)
